title: Dropping default value definitions from a table does not work as expected
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'unknown', age INT DEFAULT 18, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY name VARCHAR(50);
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY age INT;
key_bug_features: Dropping default values from table columns fails
